name: Brown Rice Chicken Bake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked chicken breast halves, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the cooked brown rice, frozen green peas, cubed chicken breast halves, mayonnaise, toasted almonds, soy sauce, black pepper, garlic powder, and dried tarragon.
2. Transfer the mixture to a 3-quart baking dish coated with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Cover the baking dish and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 to 20 minutes.
